phrases.french: Vous avez des citrons de Menton ?
phrases.context: Menton lemons (citrons de Menton) are IGP-protected and famously sweeter and less acidic than regular lemons. Ask specifically for local ones.

phrases.english: How much is it per kilo?
phrases.context: Prices are usually displayed but it's normal to ask. Market open mornings only, closed Mondays.
Besides lemons, look for barba giuan (fried parcels), socca, and pissaladière on the Riviera. Menton also has excellent olive oil.

tips: Menton lemons are IGP-protected — among the finest in the world, used by top Parisian chefs and parfumeurs
Market is open mornings only (typically 7am–1pm), closed Mondays
The Fête du Citron (Lemon Festival) takes place in February — the town fills with enormous citrus sculptures
